implementation.target_authority: An observed target failure becomes the primary route; secondary failures remain visible but cannot consume or veto the isolation pass.
implementation.interruption_recovery: Excerpt extraction now writes a validated partial file and atomically replaces the destination, so a truncated MP4 is not mistaken for a completed input.

repair_visual_intent.finding: The donor pool was initially exhausted by occupied mappings. Target-authority retry exposed swap candidates, but none improved the destination-driven visual score.

repair_transition_edges.finding: All candidates were safely rolled back.

repair_audio_masking.finding: All candidates were safely rolled back.

repair_performance_structure.finding: The first evidence region contained only one usable donor.

performance_followup.interpretation: The performance repair strategy now has measured rendered benefit. Coordinated performance-group acceptance remains unproven.

next_recommendation: Build evidence-selection recipes for the six strategies not yet observed at runtime, and revise visual compatibility so donor choice can materially change visual-fit evidence before repeating visual repair.
